title: TaqMan Fast Advanced qPCR
description: Applied Biosystems probe-based (TaqMan) fast 20 uL qPCR: optional UNG hold, fast polymerase activation, 40 cycles, no melt curve.

ingredients.name: TaqMan Assay (forward + reverse primers + FAM/VIC probe)

payload.notes: Probe-based (TaqMan) fast chemistry, so there is no melt curve. The setup is built around the pre-formulated 20X TaqMan Assay (forward + reverse primers plus a FAM- or VIC-labeled MGB probe); that assay delivers 900 nM final per primer and 250 nM final probe, which are the values to use for custom primer/probe designs. Denature and anneal/extend times shown are for fast-block instruments (QuantStudio, ViiA 7, StepOnePlus); on the 7500 / 7500 Fast use 95 C for 3 sec and 60 C for 30 sec. The optional 50 C UNG hold prevents carryover contamination, and activation can run from 20 sec up to 2 min (longer helps denature genomic DNA). Source: Applied Biosystems TaqMan Fast Advanced Master Mix User Guide (MAN0025706), https://documents.thermofisher.com/TFS-Assets/LSG/manuals/MAN0025706_TaqManFastAdvMM_UG.pdf
